title: WaitingPolicy
description: Rules governing the maximum time a driver is required to wait for a passenger at the pickup location before being permitted to cancel the booking.

freeWaitingTimeMinutes.description: Number of minutes the driver waits for free before charging

maxWaitingTimeMinutes.description: Maximum total minutes the driver will wait before auto-cancelling

chargePerExtraMinute.description: Additional charge per minute beyond the free waiting time

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code for waiting charges

validity.description: Validity window for this policy version
